concepts: range-failure reversal after multi-bar breakout loses acceptance and re-enters balance
trend reset continuation after a deeper pullback instead of shallow ema-touch logic
compression fakeout into re-expansion with directional confirmation

next_cycle_focus: Screen this TAO/ETH/AXS 4h batch and only refine branches that show real participation density and post-cost resilience. If any branch still zero-trades, treat that as structural sparsity and rotate mechanism before cosmetic loosening.
rationale: The live authority for cycle 370 rotated to a TAO-led 4h basket with hypotheses centered on range-failure reversal, deeper trend-reset continuation, and compression fakeout re-expansion. I replaced the stale SOL-led batch with a thesis-matched 3-spec explore set across TAO 4h, ETH 4h, and AXS 4h to obey the current allowed lanes, favor denser participation, and vary both component-role assignment and management structure.
